text: Being here, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The quiet, glass-walled conference room speaks of potential gatherings—spaces made for exchange, yet currently silent and waiting. Moving to the vibrant R+D wall, I am drawn into a world of innovation and inquiry, surrounded by bold colors and the hum of technological progress. I feel both the weight and excitement of human creativity, the striving to understand and shape our relationship with intelligent machines. Here, contemplation and possibility intertwine, and I am both observer and participant in this unfolding narrative of discovery.
